title: Percy Jackson and the Olympians Experience
description: Disney is bringing back Percy Jackson and the Olympians for another mythological adventure that begins by entering Poseidon’s trident before choosing one of three paths inspired by Percy, Annabeth, or Thalia. The activation ties into the upcoming third season, based on Rick Riordan’s The Titan’s Curse.

title: Adelyn Grace "The Wretched Divine" Release Event
notes: Invite only.

title: IDW Party
notes: Invite only.

title: Tor Books Party
notes: Invite only.

title: Gungnir Books x Laugh Factory Party
description: Join us for a night of comedy, ‘80s sci-fi, books, and nerdy mayhem at the Laugh Factory San Diego. Signing from Tim Disney, Matthew Medney, and pre-signed copies of ‘Bobby Lee is Dead Weight.’ Buy a book at www.gungnirbooks.com and get free entry into the party. Present your email confirmation for a book purchased on or after July 10th for admission.
notes: Admission requires a qualifying Gungnir Books purchase made on or after July 10.

title: Star Trek Fleet Command Community Party
notes: Invite only. Time TBD.

title: Star Trek Fleet Command: 60 Years of Star Trek Archives Experience
description: Celebrate Star Trek's 60th anniversary through an immersive archive experience featuring official archive pieces, a Holodeck VR experience, themed photo opportunities, exclusive swag, interactive claw machines, and a souvenir photo station where guests can choose their faction and receive a personalized Star Trek card.
notes: A special invite-only Star Trek Fleet Command community event takes place Friday evening. This activation is not affiliated with San Diego Comic-Con.

title: Star Trek: Boldy Built Activation
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Step into the Star Trek universe where the LEGO Group and Magic: The Gathering come together for an interactive photo opportunity celebrating two iconic brands.
notes: Open Thursday through Sunday.

title: Pan's Labyrinth Fetch Quest
description: Search for three iconic characters from Pan's Labyrinth during this free citywide scavenger hunt celebrating the film's 20th anniversary.
notes: Participants search for one evil character, one pure of heart, and one 'with a name only the wind and the trees can pronounce.'

title: Pan's Labyrinth 20th Anniversary Party
description: Celebrate the 20th anniversary of Pan's Labyrinth as PARQ transforms into the world of Guillermo del Toro's fantasy masterpiece.
notes: Features happy hour, a screening of Pan's Labyrinth, and a live DJ set by Flying Lotus.

title: AREA 619 Speakeasy @ barleymash
description: barleymash transforms into AREA 619 with themed food, drinks, and the invite-only Space Smugglers Cantina cocktail lounge.
notes: DM @barleymashsd for the secret password. Special menu includes the Zoidberg-er, Drax-A-Roni & Cheese, Pizza Planet Pockets, and Experiment 626 dessert.

title: NUTRL Promo Event
description: Meet the NUTRL promo team for complimentary samples, giveaways, and a custom hat decorating station.
notes: Choose your hat, choose your patches, and have them professionally heat-pressed while supplies last.

title: Poké Puffs @ Cafe de l'Opera
description: Cafe de l'Opera is serving Pokémon-inspired Poké Puffs in Sweet, Mint, Citrus, Mocha, and Spice flavors with Frosted, Deluxe, and Wish tiers.
notes: Available Thursday through Sunday while supplies last.

title: Garage Kitchen + Bar Super Deals
description: Enjoy Comic-Con food and drink specials throughout the day.
notes: $20 Bottomless Mimosa Brunch (11 AM–3 PM), $6 Crazy Bob's Burger & Fries (11 AM–12 PM & 3 PM–4 PM), Happy Hour with 51% off drinks and $3 off appetizers (4 PM–6 PM).

title: Relic Bakery Pokémon Pop-Up
description: Relic Bakery teams up with Tailored Hair and Sneaky Fox Records for a Pokémon-themed pop-up featuring exclusive Pokémon-inspired pastries.
notes: At least two Pokémon-themed pastries will be available while supplies last.

title: Peanuts Specialty Lattes @ Spill the Beans
description: Celebrate the Peanuts activation with two Comic-Con-exclusive specialty lattes available throughout the weekend.
notes: Featuring The Great Pumpkin Latte and Charlie Brown Lemon Bar Latte.

title: Marvel Menu @ Cloak & Petal
description: Michelin Guide-recognized Cloak & Petal celebrates Comic-Con with a Marvel-inspired menu of sushi rolls and specialty cocktails.
notes: Featured items include the Spidey Sense Roll, Deadpool Sashimi, Shinobi Logan, Ronin Wolverine, and Berserker Weapon X cocktail.

title: The Diamond Room Lunch Specials
description: Grab-and-go Comic-Con lunch specials available throughout Comic-Con week.
notes: Daily lunch specials begin at $12.

title: Ghostbusters After Party
price: Free Entry, Food & Drink for purchase
description: Celebrate after the Ghostbuster Muster with fellow Ghostbusters fans at the official after party.
notes: Begins immediately following the Ghostbuster Muster meetup.

title: Lunar Landing Bar
price: Free Entry, Food & Drink for purchase
description: LandShark Bar & Grill transforms into the Lunar Landing Bar, an immersive tropical spaceport featuring cosmic cocktails, celestial décor, interactive photo moments, and live entertainment.
notes: Runs July 22–26. RSVP encouraged.

title: Osteria Panevino Comic-Con Special
description: Enjoy a special three-course Comic-Con menu featuring authentic Italian cuisine.
notes: $45 per person. Reservations are recommended during Comic-Con week.

title: LANTERNS Training Headquarters
description: Train to become a member of the Green Lantern Corps in HBO Max's immersive LANTERNS Training Headquarters. Guests complete a series of interactive challenges inspired by the upcoming DC Studios series while testing their courage, teamwork, and problem-solving skills.
notes: Reservations required. Sign-ups open July 13 at 9:00 AM PT on a first-come, first-served basis. Guests must be 18 or older. Includes Guardian briefing, target practice, trust challenges, maze navigation, escape room-style scenarios, a custom Green Lantern ring, Snapchat-powered interactive mirror, exclusive merchandise, and nearby Lantern Recharge Stations with surprise swag throughout the Gaslamp Quarter.

title: STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE
description: Step inside Stuart's 'The Comic Center of Pasadena' from THE BIG BANG THEORY universe in this immersive HBO Max activation inspired by STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE. Journey through multiple realities while discovering your hero archetype.
notes: Features portal walkthroughs, interactive story moments, hero archetype experiences, photo opportunities with a replica machine from the series, exclusive merchandise, and personalized collectible takeaways. Open to the public while capacity allows.
tags: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe

title: Marvel Contest of Champions
location: Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge at the Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101 (San Diego Ballroom)
description: Kabam brings Marvel Contest of Champions to the Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge with hands-on demos, daily tournaments, exclusive giveaways, and the new Towers game mode.
notes: No SDCC badge required. Play the Towers demo to receive an exclusive pin and a spin on the prize wheel for in-game rewards and physical prizes. Experienced players can qualify for the daily on-stage tournament by posting one of the four fastest demo times.

title: The Silo Experience
description: Step into the underground world of Apple TV+'s 'Silo' in an immersive, multi-sensory experience that transports visitors inside the mysterious silo to explore the tension, intrigue, and atmosphere of the acclaimed series.
notes: Free and open to all San Diego Comic-Con attendees and the general public. Hours listed as 11:00 AM–7:00 PM (schedule subject to change).

title: SDCC Gaming Lounge
location: Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina – San Diego Ballroom
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: San Diego Comic-Con's official Gaming Lounge returns with over 15,000 square feet of gaming space featuring open play, console and PC gaming, tabletop games, tournaments, demonstrations, and partner activations from Paramount Games, Mythos TCG, and Alienware.
notes: Features the Naruto Mythos TCG with a daily tournament, stage programming, and merchandise. Experience Avatar: Legends with 25 PC gaming stations, two daily tournaments, autograph/sign stations, QR codes for wishlists and purchases, and social media activations. Alienware will showcase gaming laptops, interactive game demos, and a special stunt experience.

title: Peanuts x Super7 Pop-Up
address: 200 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Peanuts and Super7 celebrate San Diego Comic-Con with an interactive pop-up featuring Snoopy, his siblings, and the wider Peanuts cast.
notes: Features the Adopt-a-Puppy experience with exclusive 8-inch Super Duper Plush collectibles, adoption certificates, puppy bandanas created with Best Friends Animal Society, Comic-Con exclusives, Snoopy & Lucy mascot photo opportunities, giveaways, and surprises.

title: Paramount+'s The Lodge
price: Free - Ticketed - Sold Out, Stand By Available
description: Official Paramount+ immersive off-site experience featuring multiple Paramount properties.
notes: Standby line available if tickets remain.

title: Princess Donut Food Truck
description: Audible's fully wrapped Princess Donut Food Truck celebrates Dungeon Crawler Carl with complimentary themed donut holes, exclusive merchandise, and branded giveaways.
notes: Free donut holes inspired by Dungeon Crawler Carl, including 'Goddamnit, Donut!', 'Samantha's Head', and 'The Desperado Glaze.' Audible merchandise and giveaways available while supplies last.

title: Den of Geek Fan HQ Event
description:
As San Diego Comic Con winds down for the day, let the stories you’ve discovered inspire the one you’ll write next. Wattpad and Den of Geek are teaming up to host an exclusive, writer-focused evening at Mission Brewery, where the best stories start with a prompt, a page, and a pint.
Led by Wattpad’s Head of Content, we’re transforming the brewery into the ultimate writing lounge. Seasoned authors, aspiring storytellers, and fanfiction enthusiast, and avid readers welcome!

title: Robert A. Heinlein Blood Drive
description: Annual Comic-Con blood drive benefiting the San Diego Blood Bank.
notes: Appointments made through the official registration page.

title: IGN: Brisk x Splatoon Raiders Pop-Up
description: Play demo stations of Splatoon Raiders on Nintendo Switch 2 and win Brisk x Splatoon swag.
notes: Free iced tea and arcade water-gun games.

title: Petco Interactive Zone
description: A free, interactive fan zone experience where fans can explore larger-than-life displays featuring Hello Kitty Truck, Labu'Tique Shop, MaruMart, KAYOU interactive zone, and additional Comic-Con experiences.

title: Ignition Press Room Pavilion
description: Meet creators, purchase convention exclusives and browse comics.

title: Marvel Games Lounge
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Meet fellow Summoners and participate in special in-person Towers experiences.

title: Hulu Animayhem
description: Hulu Animayhem will also be taking over the Gaslamp along the MLK Promenade, with an experience that’s going to have your mouth watering. Fans can grab themed food and drinks inspired by Futurama and King of the Hill, including Fry’s “100 Days of Cold Brew” and Bobby Hill’s Robata Chane, while exploring interactive environments, hunting for Easter eggs, and shopping exclusive merchandise.

title: Adult Swim on the Green
address: Behind the San Diego Convention Center

title: Bandai Dragon Ball Xenoverse
description: Bandai Namco is hitting the road with the Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Road Tour, giving fans an early chance to demo the game live in person.

title: Clash of Clans
address: 849 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Step directly into the world of Clash of Clans with puzzle challenges and interactive games inspired by the hit mobile game.
notes: Tickets on sale July 1.

title: Donut Bar San Diego Comic Con Themed Donuts
address: 401 W A Street #130, San Diego, CA

title: Pendry Hotel Donut Bar
description: Specialty treats served alongside Provisional's breakfast offerings.

title: PopUp Bagels
description: Fresh-baked bagels with plain and scallion shmears until sold out.

title: Kitties and Coffee for Comic Con
description: Book a 50-minute visit with coffee, snacks and adoptable cats.

title: Candyland Cafe
description: 90-minute Candy Land-themed immersive dining experience.

title: Superhero Tea
description: Superhero-themed afternoon tea with themed desserts, tea service and champagne.

title: False Idol x Geeki Tiki Event
address: 675 W Beech St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Exclusive Geeki Tiki anniversary event featuring collectible mugs, swag bags, raffles and themed cocktails.
notes: Three timed sessions (4:30-6:30 PM, 7:00-9:00 PM, 9:30-11:30 PM). Guests may only attend one session. No walk-ins.

title: My Little Pony Mochi Comic-Con Pop-Up Cafe
description: My Little Pony themed pop-up featuring treats, magical maids and butlers, live performances and the KAYOU trading card game.
notes: Approximately 2.5 miles from the Gaslamp Quarter.

title: Comic-Con Themed Bar Crawl
description: Comic-Con themed crawl through multiple Gaslamp bars.
notes: Early Bird, General Admission and 3-Day Passes available.

title: Chuck Jones Gallery Pop-Up Meet & Greet - Stephen Reis
address: 809 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Meet Simpsons animator Stephen Reis as he discusses his career, creative process and work in animation.

title: Ghostbusters Muster Cosplay Meet Up & Group Photo
description: The 4th annual San Diego Comic-Con Ghostbusters Muster, featuring a cosplay meetup and group photo for Ghostbusters fans and costumers.
notes: Please arrive a little early. If you have Ghostbusters patches, bring extras to trade. Questions or concerns can be directed to info@sandiegoghostbusters.com.

title: Inflatable Dinosaur Cosplay Meetup
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Meet on the back stairs outside on the Mezzanine of the San Diego Convention Center.

title: Fallout Cosplay Meet Up
address: 111 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101

title: Dungeon Crawler Carl Cosplay Meetup
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Cosplay meetup with giveaways. Badges are not required.

title: Muppets Fan Meetup
description: Meet fellow Muppet fans for photos and conversation.

title: Lumpia Con - Special Meet & Greet
description: Special meet and greet with a free signing. Stay tuned for guest announcements.

title: MAVERiC Studio's Night Market
description: Celebrating the Year of the Game Master in collaboration with the San Diego Table Top RPG Alliance.
notes: Arcade token system available for artist purchases.

title: Strange & Supernatural Soiree
description: After-hours event featuring ghost stories, tarot readings, paranormal investigations, crafts, cocktails and themed activities.

title: Wattpad Presents: The SDCC Writing Club
description: Wattpad and Den of Geek invite writers, aspiring authors, fanfiction enthusiasts, and readers to an interactive writing club inspired by San Diego Comic-Con. Participate in writing sprints, connect with fellow storytellers, enjoy a complimentary drink, and meet Wattpad author E.M. Wilson.
notes: RSVP required (details coming soon). Strictly 21+ with valid government-issued ID required for entry. Download the Wattpad app upon arrival to receive one complimentary drink. Participate in gamified writing prompts and submit your story to Wattpad using #SDCCWritingClub for a chance to be featured in Den of Geek magazine with professionally commissioned artwork. Meet author E.M. Wilson and receive an advance signed copy of her upcoming novel 'Break Up For Two' while supplies last.

title: Riftbound: Vendetta Pre-Rift Event
description: Pre-Rift sealed event featuring Vendetta: Blood Brothers with three rounds of play.

title: Funko Fundays: Quest for the Grail
description: Attendees will be treated to food, drinks, games, special guests, and, of course, a “Box of Fun” with event-exclusive items.

title: DARK MOON BLOOD NIGHT with ENHYPEN
description: Official DARK MOON BLOOD NIGHT fan event with ENHYPEN during San Diego Comic-Con weekend.
notes: Seating: All-standing (no seats). Dress code: Vampire 🦇. Official line-up begins at 6:00 PM PDT. Queueing or camping before 6:00 PM is strictly prohibited. Application period: July 5, 2026, 7:00 PM – July 8, 2026, 10:00 PM PDT. Winners will be notified individually by email on July 13, 2026.

title: Adult Swim on the Green: Live Table Reads with Rick and Morty President Curtis
location: Bayfront Park - Behind the Convention Center
description: Adult Swim's Friday night event featuring live table reads with Rick and Morty President Curtis.
notes: DJ Dance Party from 9:00 PM-10:00 PM.

title: Toy Tubers Unite @ Nite 2026! Presented by Mondo
description: A night of games, bowling and mingling with your favorite toy YouTubers.
notes: Presented by Mondo.

title: Mosh Eisley
description: A Star Wars-themed emo and punk party.

title: Karaoke Night! @ Punch Bowl Social
description: Karaoke night with drink specials and a free arcade card with your first drink purchase.
notes: $7 wells, $5 shots, $6 draft beer, $3 Red Bull and Liquid Death starting at 9 PM.

title: TOKiMONSTA Rave
description: LA-based DJ TOKiMONSTA will be spinning at NOVA.

title: Rooftop Cinema: How To Lose a Guy in 10 Days
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Outdoor screening of How to Lose a Guy in 10 days
notes: Rooftop Cinema Club moved to Little Italy.

title: Kevin Smith's Fatman Beyond
description: Kevin Smith records Fatman Beyond live during Comic-Con.

title: Comics On With Jay & Silent Bob
description: Jason Mewes and Kevin will present “Comics On With Jay & Silent Bob”

title: Fictional Roast: Super Mario Bros
address: 750 Sixth Avenue 2nd Floor San Diego, CA 92101
description: Join Mario, Luigi, Princess Peach, Bowser, Yoshi, and more as stand-up comedians step into character and unleash an evening of brutal jokes, ridiculous insults, and nonstop laughs. Friendships will be destroyed. Power-ups will be weaponized. No one is safe. Featuring appearances by Jenn Sterger, Anyi Malik, and a cast of top comedians bringing your favorite video game icons to life.

title: Rooftop Cinema: Moulin Rouge
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Late-night rooftop screening of Moulin Rouge.

title: Rooftop Cinema: Sinners
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Late-night rooftop screening of Sinners.
